title: Add formula in formula column with api
excerpt:
Hello, 
I can create or read formula column through api, but how to add formula through api ?

posts.author: AartiKulkarni (Aarti Kulkarni)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I can create or read formula column through api, but how to add formula through api ?

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @AartiKulkarni,

This isn’t possible as the formula is currently calculated in the client. You can open a feature request here for this to be considered when designing the roadmap!

Best,
Rachel
